summary: Focana now helps you maintain momentum after a session ends and resume work with less friction.
fixes: Floating re-entry prompts now stay in the floating flow more reliably instead of unexpectedly restoring the main window.
Save for Later, break, and done-for-now handoffs now preserve task continuity more reliably across full, compact, and floating windows.
The new post-session and notes screens now size more cleanly so actions and text fields stay visible.
improvements: Ending a session now opens a guided post-session flow with Take a break, Start another session, and Done for now.
Session notes are now split into Immediate next step and Additional details so restart cues stay separate from background context.
Starting another session after a wrap-up now drops you into a clean composer with Parking Lot and Session History close by.
Keep for Later is now available as a global shortcut with Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+K for quick Parking Lot capture.
Focused check-ins now support Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+Y for a quick Yes response when Focana is frontmost.
